rationale.R1.2: The rewrite identifies the contradiction between the doubly-robust framing and the paired data collection method.
rationale.RX.1: The rewrite flags uncertainty regarding the empirical results and the assumptions underlying the optimality claim.
rationale.RX.3: The rewrite mostly stays within scope, but could benefit from a more precise description of the changes made to the abstract.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The rewrite provides some traceability by explaining the reasoning behind the changes made, but lacks detailed annotations for each non-cosmetic change.
